{{conversationContext}}
§ 01Appreciation

{{contactName}}, thank you for taking the time to speak with me{{conversationContext}}. I genuinely enjoyed our conversation and appreciated your willingness to share your perspective.

It's clear that you bring a wealth of experience to your work at {{contactFirm}}, and I valued the opportunity to connect.

§ 02What Stood Out

What resonated most with me was your insight on how business owners often underestimate the planning required for a successful transition. That perspective aligns closely with the work we do at Forhemit — helping owners think through the full picture well before they need to act.

For context: Forhemit is a Public Benefit Corporation that stewards business transitions to Employee Stock Ownership Plans (ESOPs). We work alongside owners, advisors, and lenders to ensure the process is structured, transparent, and in the best interest of everyone involved.
§ 03Stay Connected

I'd welcome the chance to stay in touch. If you ever have questions about ESOP transitions — whether for a specific client or just out of general curiosity — please don't hesitate to reach out. I'm always happy to be a resource, no strings attached.

Our door is always open for professionals who care about doing right by business owners and their employees.

§ 04Next Steps

{{followUpAction}}

§ 05Open Door

Thank you again for the conversation. I look forward to staying connected and exploring ways we can support each other's work in the years ahead.

deals@forhemit.com
